segments.text: [Music] just to tell you how these stories going to jump into my head anyone heard of the case where someone doing temples injected someone's brain with filler yeah so what can you do the question then comes so it's only your personality in the frontal lobe so you still be able to do most things so what can you do to reduce the risk of that so these things are continuously pop into my head the angle of your needle would change that risk completely because if I angle in such a way that I'm aiming towards where the optical bone is then I'm if I go too deep I'm going to keep going into the orbit so all that means is the difference between an angle like that versus an angle like that then changes where I'm going to go for go too deep so I'm always looking for little things
that chip away at risk and make my patients just a little bit safer so that's one more risk ruled out

transcript: [Music] just to tell you how these stories going to jump into my head anyone heard of the case where someone doing temples injected someone's brain with filler yeah so what can you do the question then comes so it's only your personality in the frontal lobe so you still be able to do most things so what can you do to reduce the risk of that so these things are continuously pop into my head the angle of your needle would change that risk completely because if I angle in such a way that I'm aiming towards where the optical bone is then I'm if I go too deep I'm going to keep going into the orbit so all that means is the difference between an angle like that versus an angle like that then changes where I'm going to go for go too deep so I'm always looking for little things that chip away at risk and make my patients just a little bit safer so that's one more risk ruled out
